label: BSP网格
description: 用二叉空间分割（BSP）算法递归划分输入网格的可用区域，生成多房间布局，每个房间填充唯一ID
description-en: Recursively partitions the available area of an input grid using Binary Space Partitioning (BSP) to generate a multi-room layout, filling each room with a unique ID.
icon: 俯视角地牢房间平面图，若干矩形房间由粗边框围成，房间内部各填充不同淡色，扁平插画风格，深灰色背景，主色为蓝灰与橙黄，简洁无阴影

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入网格，从其尺寸（行数×列数）推断生成区域大小；网格内容不影响分割结果
inputs.description-en: Input grid whose dimensions (rows × cols) define the generation area; cell values are not used.

inputs.name: minRoomSize
inputs.label: 最小房间尺寸
inputs.description: 房间在任意方向上的最小格子数（含墙），小于此尺寸的叶节点不再分割
inputs.description-en: Minimum cell count in any direction (including walls); leaf nodes smaller than this will not be split.

inputs.name: maxDepth
inputs.label: 最大分割深度
inputs.description: BSP递归最大层数，控制房间总数上限
inputs.description-en: Maximum BSP recursion depth, which limits the total number of rooms.

inputs.name: wallThickness
inputs.label: 墙体厚度
inputs.description: 房间边缘保留的墙体格子数（最小1）
inputs.description-en: Number of wall cells reserved at each room boundary (minimum 1).

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0使用当前时间戳

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 房间网格
outputs.description: 输出多值网格，每个房间区域填充唯一正整数ID，墙体和未分配区域为0
outputs.description-en: Output multi-value grid where each room region is filled with a unique positive integer ID; walls and unassigned areas are 0.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 各房间ID与名称的映射列表，格式为 [{id, name}]
outputs.description-en: List mapping each room ID to its name, formatted as [{id, name}].
